metadata.title: cardiolipin metabolic process (GO:0032048) (Human)
metadata.comment: I'm unsure where to fit LCLAT1 into the model. A paper suggested this only occurs in pathological conditions e.g. https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC9221202/, However Reactome thought it might be ok. It could be that it is a general recovery mechanism for stresses, note also that different cell types may produce other cardiolipin species than heart (?) and CL has been detected in sperm acrosome
